heading: Step 2: Set up your credentials
body:
Run the following code in your notebook to set up your MongoDB
connection string and OpenAI API key:

```python
import getpass
import os
from openai import OpenAI

MONGODB_URI = getpass.getpass("Enter your MongoDB connection string:")
os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"] = getpass.getpass("Enter your OpenAI API Key:")
openai_client = OpenAI()
```

codeBlocks.content:
import getpass
import os
from openai import OpenAI

MONGODB_URI = getpass.getpass("Enter your MongoDB connection string:")
os.environ["OPENAI_API_KEY"] = getpass.getpass("Enter your OpenAI API Key:")
openai_client = OpenAI()
